other_observers: none; The brant was originally reported at this location by Cade Cropper and Jim Thompson on December 3, and had been reported other times since then. I went to Lake Loveland on December 18 specifically looking for this bird.
specific_location: northwest side of Lake Loveland 40.416 deg N, 105.095 deg W
description: goose, smaller than nearby Canada geese, all black head, black breast and belly, white necklace, vertical white side stripesBehaviors: The bird was initially swimming among Canada geese. Then, I was pleasantly surprised to see it swim and then walk toward me. After being out of the water for a few minutes, it flew northwestward with many of the Canada geese.Call: none heardPlumage: adult
